name: Aunt Dimity's Butterscotch Brownies
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 375°F (190°C).
2. Butter a 9-inch square cake pan.
3. Mix all ingredients together, combining them well.
4. Spread the mixture in the cake pan and bake for 35 to 40 minutes, or until dry on top and almost firm to the touch.
5. Let cool for 10 to 15 minutes, then cut into 2-inch squares.
Makes 16 brownies.
NOTES: delicious - rich and satisfying; I added pecans
